task_completion.description: Verify that the source countries shapefile is loaded into the gvSIG view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The gvSIG Table of Contents (TOC) shows 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' (or similar) and the map view displays the world countries.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Dissolve geoprocessing tool is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box or window for the 'Dissolve' geoprocessing tool is visible in the gvSIG interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Dissolve tool is configured to use the 'CONTINENT' field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Dissolve tool dialog, the attribute field selected for the dissolve/merge operation is 'CONTINENT'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the output path is set to the required export location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The output file path in the Dissolve tool dialog is explicitly set to '/home/ga/gvsig_exports/continents_dissolved.shp'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the dissolve operation has completed and the resulting layer is displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new layer (e.g., 'continents_dissolved') appears in the TOC, and the map view shows simplified continent geometries with internal country borders removed.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the gvSIG Desktop GUI to perform the operation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with gvSIG menus, dialogs, and map views, rather than a terminal running command-line spatial tools (like ogr2ogr).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually configured the tool rather than just opening a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Progression of screenshots showing the tool opening, parameters being selected, and the execution process.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not write a Python script to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors or IDEs (like nano, vim, gedit, VS Code) are open with spatial processing scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source layer is '/home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp'. The dissolve operation must be performed on the 'CONTINENT' field. The output must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/gvsig_exports/continents_dissolved.shp'. A successful dissolve will result in exactly 8 features (continents) including Africa, Asia, Europe, North America, South America, and Oceania.
